case_title: JOSE LUIS RAMOS VS. NEW COLLGEG OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMOS, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLGEG OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMOS, JOSE LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLGEG OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $10,945.89 PRINCIPAL, $51.78 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,297.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
